Cors._note: Browser origins allowed to call the API (the dashboard sends a custom X-Brand-Id header → preflight). Dev default is the Next.js frontend; override per environment via Cors__AllowedOrigins__0, __1, …

_note: Non-secret dev defaults only. Secrets (ConnectionStrings:Postgres, Anthropic:ApiKey, Gemini:ApiKey, Minio:AccessKey, Minio:SecretKey, Vault:Token) are NOT stored here — supply them via env / Actions secrets / Vault KV. Missing required keys fail validation at startup.

Gemini._note: Mode=mock uses the deterministic media tool (CI/demo, no live Gemini); live = the real Gemini image client. ApiKey is a secret (env / Vault KV), never stored here. Model/ApiVersion/TimeoutSeconds/MaxRetries are non-secret, config-swappable.

Judge._note: Phase-9 LLM-judge tier (DL-057). PassThreshold binarizes the 1-5 judge rubric for the Cohen's-κ gate.

Storage._note: PublicBaseUrl is the Meta-reachable public origin prepended to a brand-prefixed asset key to form the live MediaUrl Meta fetches server-side (DL-055): {PublicBaseUrl}/brands/{brand_id}/assets/{asset_id}.png. Empty in mock/CI/compose (the mock ignores MediaUrl); the live runbook sets it to the public tunnel host.

Generation._note: ChatMode=mock uses the deterministic generation IChatClient (CI/demo, no live Claude, no spend); live = real Anthropic. Owns the single IChatClient the RAG query-transformer also consumes.

CostPrices._note: Per-million-token text prices and per-image Gemini price (USD), seeded from current live values. Langfuse captures actuals; Phase 9 refines the static estimates, not these.

Meta._note: Mode=mock (default) runs the full loop with zero live Meta access; live = the optional human-gated dual-channel path (DL-055). GraphBaseUrl/GraphApiVersion/TimeoutSeconds/MaxRetries are non-secret, config-swappable. The per-brand token is NOT here — it is Transit ciphertext in BrandMetaConnection, decrypted on-use at the call.

Langfuse._note: Optional tracing. Empty BaseUrl/keys = no-op local recorder (run never fails). Keys are secrets — supply Langfuse:PublicKey / Langfuse:SecretKey via env / Vault KV.
